title: 2026 Oscar Best Actress Predictions
text: Gold Derby compiled predictions from experts, editors, and top-performing users for the 2026 Oscar Best Actress race. Jessie Buckley from Focus Features' Hamnet leads with 95.16% odds. Rose Byrne from A24's If I Had Legs I'd Kick You has 3.32% odds. Renate Reinsve from NEON's Sentimental Value has 0.82% odds. Emma Stone from Focus Features' Bugonia has 0.52% odds with her two-time Best Actress wins and five total nominations. Kate Hudson from Focus Features' Song Sung Blue has 0.17% odds. The article notes Katharine Hepburn has the most overall wins in this race at four.
